query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts) as total_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE avatarUrl IS NOT NULL AND avatarUrl != '') as with_avatar,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE avatarUrl IS NULL OR avatarUrl = '') as without_avatar;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3LPssBLFuVbNm9U.root --database bdpiDWPftxaP5joCkvKLNw --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts) as total_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE avatarUrl IS NOT NULL AND avatarUrl != '') as with_avatar,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE avatarUrl IS NULL OR avatarUrl = '') as without_avatar;
